text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
46 
COV_CRITERIA 
LABEL: 
Coverage Criteria (Part A/B or B only Requirement) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the requirement that beneficiaries be entitled to Medicare Part A is 
waived. 
The value will indicate whether beneficiaries with only Part B entitlement may enroll in the plan 
benefit package. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files)
